---
title: "About Me"
---
A little more about me, both inside and outside of work!

# EDUCATION AND RESEARCH INTERESTS

I am currently an undergraduate pre-law student in my second year at UC Santa Barbara, majoring in [Environmental Studies](https://es.ucsb.edu/){target="_blank"}, [Geography](https://www.geog.ucsb.edu/){target="_blank"}, and [Philosophy](https://www.philosophy.ucsb.edu/){target="_blank"}, with a minor in [Legal Humanities](https://www.duels.ucsb.edu/minors/legal-humanities-minor){target="_blank"}. Within my fields of study, I have a particular interest in environmental policy, and love exploring how ecological research and innovations intersect with legislation to create feasible and sustainable environmental solutions. In particular, I hope to further explore the ecological processes behind larger ecosystemic regulation, and use those explorations to create feasible legislative actions pertaining to endangered species policy.

## CURRENTLY
At the moment, I am seeking employment opportunities in conservation research and environmental policy. Since 2025, I have worked with [Ken Hiltner](https://english.ucsb.edu/people/faculty/hiltner-ken/){target="_blank"} at UCSB as an Undergraduate Research Assistant, approaching historical and modern media from an ecocritical perspective, and exploring the impacts our media has had on our modern environmental perceptions. Outside of UCSB, I have been conducting personal research about the ecological impacts of invasive shrew-species on island locales since 2023, specifically focusing on the Irish Isles and the effects nonnative greater-white-toothed shrews have had on the local ecology.

I'm always excited for the opportunity to collaborate on new/existing projects with others. Please feel free reach out if you are interested in connecting, working together, or even just to say hi! 
---
# CLIMBING
Outside of school and work, I also love exploring the outdoors. 


<p class = "title"> this is boiii </p>

<p class = "center-text"> bah bah boiii </p>
<div class="title">
  Some element (e.g. text) to style
</div>
Some text with just [this section]{.title} styled

# boi
## BOIII


Outside of school and work, I love exploring the outdoors, listening to music, and spending time with those close to me.
